hero.title: Run the team like one system.
hero.subtitle: Built around Shopee operations, TikTok Shop expansion, and Miaoshou ERP data flow, JPY brings tasks, messages, orders, inventory, profit, and pricing into one remote workspace.

workflow.title: Remote by default. Clear by system.
workflow.description: Even when three people are not in the same place, tasks, messages, orders, exceptions, and profit states keep the team synchronized. Each person sees what they need to handle. The owner sees the whole operating picture.

cards.label: Tasks
cards.title: Today Tasks
cards.description: Split operations, support, fulfillment, and exceptions into clear work items.

cards.label: Messages
cards.title: Customer Messages
cards.description: Turn Shopee messages and after-sales issues into trackable actions.

cards.label: Exceptions
cards.title: Order Exceptions
cards.description: Flag pending shipment, logistics issues, stock gaps, and low-profit orders.

cards.label: Approval
cards.title: Pricing Approval
cards.description: Operators submit pricing suggestions. The owner approves before execution.

cards.label: Listing
cards.title: Product Listing
cards.description: Manage titles, categories, assets, and launch rhythm.

cards.label: Orders
cards.title: Order Handling
cards.description: Track shipment queues, cancellations, refunds, and order exceptions.

cards.label: Support
cards.title: Customer Messages
cards.description: Convert pre-sale and after-sale messages into visible work.

cards.label: Inventory
cards.title: Inventory Alerts
cards.description: Catch stockouts, slow movers, and replenishment risks early.

cards.label: Profit
cards.title: Profit Snapshot
cards.description: Read profit status across orders, campaigns, and products quickly.

cards.label: Campaign
cards.title: Campaign Pricing
cards.description: Record campaign price suggestions, approvals, and execution status.

cards.label: SLA
cards.title: Fulfillment SLA
cards.description: Reserve entrances for shipment timing, delay risks, and platform metrics.

cards.label: Support
cards.title: Response Flow
cards.description: Reserve message response, after-sales handling, and ticket collaboration.

cards.label: Health
cards.title: Shop Health
cards.description: Reserve score, violation, fulfillment, and service indicators.

cards.label: Assets
cards.title: Content Assets
cards.description: Organize product assets, video scripts, and publishing preparation.

cards.label: Content
cards.title: Live / Short Video
cards.description: Keep content tasks and product operations in one operating rhythm.

cards.label: Orders
cards.title: Orders & Logistics
cards.description: Reserve order, logistics, exception, and after-sales follow-up.

miaoshou.title: Miaoshou ERP Bridge.
miaoshou.description: Later, through API authorization, file imports, or scheduled sync, listing, order, inventory, logistics, and profit data from Miaoshou can be collected into the JPY workspace.

cards.label: Listing
cards.title: Listing Data
cards.description: Sync products, titles, categories, statuses, and update records.

cards.label: Orders
cards.title: Order Data
cards.description: Collect order status, value, buyer context, and exception flags.

cards.label: Inventory
cards.title: Inventory Data
cards.description: Align available stock, locked stock, shortages, and replenishment.

cards.label: Logistics
cards.title: Logistics Data
cards.description: Track shipment, labels, transit, and delivery milestones.

cards.label: Profit
cards.title: Profit Data
cards.description: Summarize costs, fees, selling prices, and profit ranges.

cards.label: Import
cards.title: API / File Import
cards.description: Reserve authorization, upload, and scheduled sync paths first.

cards.label: Owner
cards.title: Owner
cards.description: Views overview and profit, approves pricing, escalates exceptions, exports finance and tax files, and manages API authorization.

cards.label: Operator
cards.title: Operator
cards.description: Handles listings, title optimization, campaign pricing, inventory alerts, Shopee operations, and reserved TikTok modules.

cards.label: Support & Fulfillment
cards.title: Support & Fulfillment
cards.description: Handles customer messages, after-sales tickets, shipment status, logistics exceptions, payment reconciliation, and documents.

footer.title: JPY Team Workspace
footer.note: Login, real data, and workspace permissions will be connected in later steps.

hero.title: Run the team like one system.
